def build_prompts(items):
    prompts = []
    for item in items:
        prompt = ""
        prompt += "Context: " + item["context"] + "\n"
        prompt += "Question: " + item["question"] + "\n"
        prompt += "Answer in " + str(item["max_tokens"]) + " tokens."
        prompts.append(prompt)
    return prompts


def generate_batch(questions, context):
    results = []
    for q in questions:
        text = "Given the following context:\n"
        text += context + "\n\n"
        text += "Please answer: " + q + "\n"
        text += "Be concise."
        results.append(text)
    return results


def format_messages(data):
    messages = []
    for entry in data:
        msg = "User: " + entry["user"] + "\n"
        msg += "System: " + entry["system"] + "\n"
        msg += "Task: " + entry["task"]
        messages.append(msg)
    return messages
